scripts.test: bun run test:db:reset && turbo run test --filter=app --filter=@featul/api --filter=@featul/auth --filter=@featul/ui
scripts.test:watch: bun run test:db:start && turbo run test --filter=app --filter=@featul/api --filter=@featul/auth --filter=@featul/ui -- --watch
scripts.test:coverage: bun run test:db:reset && turbo run test --filter=app --filter=@featul/api --filter=@featul/auth --filter=@featul/ui -- --coverage
scripts.test:db:reset: bun run packages/test/scripts/db-start.ts && bun run packages/test/scripts/reset-db.ts
